title: SWD players and coach selected for SA Schools teams
description: GEORGE NEWS - Following the Stadio u.18...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Following the Stadio u.18 Craven and Academy week, two players and one coach from the SWD were selected for the SA Schools teams and management.


> The players selected are scrum-half Elgernon Meyer (Outeniqua High School), who was selected for the SA Schools team, and outside centre Kurt Coetzee (Oakdale agricultural high school) who was selected for the SA Schools A team. Also from Oakdale High School is Adriaan Jansen, who will be the conditioning coach for the SA Schools A team.


The SWD Craven week team only won one of their three matches. They beat the Valke 41-34 in their first game of the tournament, followed by a 19-28 loss to the Sharks, and narrowly losing 40-45 against the Lions in their final match. Reinhardt Viljoen was chosen as man of the match for the Valke match and Kai Prat for the Lions match.

The outside centre Kurt Coetzee of Oakdale was selected for the SA Schools A team. Photo: Franco Rossouw

The SWD Academy team beat the Leopards 22-19, lost 34-36 against the Griffons and put on a phenomenal performance against the Border Bulldogs, beating them 106-10.

The SA Schools and SA Schools A teams will face off on Thursday 4 July at 15:00.

Adriaan Jansen of Oakdale agricultural high school was selected as die conditioning coach for the SA Schools A team. Photo: EJ Langner

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
